title: Scaphyglottis micrantha
taxonomy: Scaphyglottis micrantha is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus that belongs to the subtribe Cranichidinae. The subtribe Cranichidinae is part of the tribe Cranichideae, which is further divided into the subfamilies Spiranthoideae and Cranichideae. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant Scaphyglottis micrantha.
benefits: Unfortunately, I don't have any information on the health benefits of Scaphyglottis micrantha.
